## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `ruff check app/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `python -m mypy app/` passes
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -q` passes locally
- [ ] UI strings (if any) added to **all three** i18n catalogs (`en`, `es`, `fr`)
- [ ] Item mutations (if any) emit an `ItemEvent`
- [ ] Code, comments, and docs are in English
